query: Can you help design a 5-day travel plan for a group of 4, starting from Evansville and visiting 2 cities in Texas? The trip spans from March 12th to March 16th, 2022. Our budget is now $9,500, and for accommodations, we require entire rooms that do not restrict parties. Also, note that we prefer to avoid airline transportation.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Evansville to Texarkana, duration: 8 hours 45 mins, distance: 889 km, cost: 44

plan.attraction: Museum of Regional History; Texarkana Museums System; Four States Auto Museum; ArtSparK; Ace of Clubs House; Discovery Place Interactive Museum; Texarkana Wall Murals #FABKMURAL; Lindsey Railroad Museum in Downtown Texarkana;
plan.accommodation: Park Slope Home away from Home, Texarkana

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Texarkana to Longview, duration: 1 hour 36 mins, distance: 142 km, cost: 7

plan.attraction: Longview World of Wonders; Gregg County Historical Museum; Longview Museum of Fine Arts; KidsView Playground; Lear Park; Longview Arboretum and Nature Center; Teague Park; Stamper Park; Lear Park - Jack M Mann Splash Pad; Rotary Park; Paul Boorman Trail Park; Air U Trampoline Park; McWhorter Park;
plan.accommodation: Cozy, bright Bohemian pad in NYC's Epic Village, Longview

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Longview to Evansville, duration: 10 hours 8 mins, distance: 1,045 km, cost: 52
